///<reference types="svelte" />
;function $$render() {

	 let title/*Ωignore_startΩ*/;title = __sveltets_2_any(title);/*Ωignore_endΩ*/;
	 let count = 0;
	 let onSelect/*Ωignore_startΩ*/;onSelect = __sveltets_2_any(onSelect);/*Ωignore_endΩ*/;

	let internal = "private";
;
async () => {

 { svelteHTML.createElement("h1", {});title; }
 { svelteHTML.createElement("p", {}); count; }
 { svelteHTML.createElement("button", {  "on:click":onSelect,});  }
 { svelteHTML.createElement("p", {}); internal; }
};
return { props: {title: title , count: count , onSelect: onSelect}, exports: {}, bindings: "", slots: {}, events: {} }}
const Legacy__SvelteComponent_ = __sveltets_2_isomorphic_component(__sveltets_2_partial(['count'], __sveltets_2_with_any_event($$render())));
/*Ωignore_startΩ*/type Legacy__SvelteComponent_ = InstanceType<typeof Legacy__SvelteComponent_>;
/*Ωignore_endΩ*/export default Legacy__SvelteComponent_;
